tagline: Your Outdoor Living Experts in Polk County

hero.headline:
Polk County's Trusted Outdoor Living
Experts
hero.subheadline: From sparkling pools to sizzling grills, Mannix Pools & Grills delivers complete backyard transformations across all of Polk County. Fair pricing, friendly staff, and quality work that actually increases your property value.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Paver & Outdoor Kitchen<br class="hidden md:block"> Solutions Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Whether you need weekly pool maintenance, a full remodel, or a custom outdoor kitchen, Mannix handles it all so you can enjoy your backyard worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough cleaning with full chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, and filter checks every visit. We keep your pool crystal clear through Florida's toughest heat and humidity.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, retiling, coping upgrades, and complete pool makeovers that breathe new life into aging pools. Built to withstand Central Florida's sun and storms.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, salt systems, gas heaters, heat pumps, and automatic cleaners diagnosed, repaired, or replaced fast. We keep your pool running efficiently year-round.

cards.title: Paver Installation
cards.description: Custom walkways, patios, pool surrounds, and driveways designed and installed with precision. Durable, beautiful hardscaping that elevates your entire outdoor space.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: From simple grill islands to fully equipped outdoor cooking spaces, we design and build kitchens that turn your backyard into the ultimate entertainment destination.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp? Our green-to-clean service restores even the worst pools to sparkling condition fast, with ongoing plans to keep them that way.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. We will visit your property, assess your pool and outdoor space, and provide a fair, detailed quote with no hidden fees or pressure.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our certified team arrives on schedule and executes your project with precision. Whether it is weekly cleaning or a full remodel, we treat your property like our own.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Relax by a sparkling pool, fire up the outdoor kitchen, and reclaim your weekends. If anything is not perfect, we make it right — that is the Mannix promise.

about.label: Why Polk County Trusts Mannix
about.headline: Fair Pricing, Quality Work, Relationships That Last
about.description: For nearly two decades, Mannix Pools & Grills has been the go-to outdoor living company for families across Polk County. As a Florida State Certified Contractor (CPC-1458804), we bring professional-grade expertise to every job — from routine pool cleanings to complete outdoor transformations. We built this business on integrity, quick response times, and the kind of friendly, personal service that keeps neighbors recommending us year after year.

features.title: State Certified Contractor
features.description: Fully licensed (CPC-1458804) and insured. Every project meets Florida building codes and is backed by professional accountability.

features.title: One-Stop Outdoor Shop
features.description: Pool care, pavers, outdoor kitchens, and grills all from one trusted team. No juggling multiple contractors or conflicting schedules.

features.title: Relationship-Driven Service
features.description: We remember your name, your pool, and your preferences. Quick response times and friendly staff who genuinely care about your satisfaction.

pricing.headline: Fair, Transparent Pricing for Every Budget
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your needs. We provide detailed quotes upfront so you always know exactly what you are paying for.

guarantee.headline: Our "Splash-Proof" Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any service visit does not meet your expectations, call us within 48 hours and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 19 years by standing behind every job, big or small. Your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is the foundation our business was built on.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Polk County including Winter Haven, Lakeland, Auburndale, Davenport, Haines City, Lake Wales, Bartow, Eagle Lake, Lake Alfred, Mulberry, Polk City, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or equipment failures, we offer priority response to get your pool back in shape fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will always know what was done and what condition your pool is in after each visit.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a Florida State Certified Pool Contractor (License CPC-1458804) and carry full liability insurance. We have been BBB Accredited since 2001.

faqs.question: Do you sell and install grills and outdoor kitchens?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry a full line of grills in our Winter Haven showroom and design custom outdoor kitchens from concept to completion. Stop by our store at 3500 Cypress Gardens Rd to see our displays.

testimonials.name: Brian K.
testimonials.text: Mannix has kept our pool spotless for over two years now. They show up on time, are incredibly thorough, and their chemical balancing is dialed in perfectly. Best pool service we have ever used in Polk County.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: We hired Mannix for a complete pool resurface and new pavers around the deck. The transformation was incredible — it looks like a brand new pool. Fair price, finished on schedule, and the crew was super professional.

testimonials.name: Carlos & Diana T.
testimonials.text: From design to final install, the outdoor kitchen exceeded our expectations. The team listened to exactly what we wanted and delivered a space our whole family loves. We grill out there almost every night now.
